version: CASEY TITAN X v50 Output Domination
title: Airport Infrastructure
prompt: Modern airport expansion with terminal runway baggage systems and live operations
scenario_why: Parallel design/procurement, acceleration, premium logistics and higher interface risk.
executive_summary: Airport Infrastructure has been classified as Airport / Aviation in Global / Not specified. CASEY estimates $11.5B P50 cost, $9.2B to $14.9B range, 87 month baseline, Medium risk and 59% confidence under the Faster scenario.
confidence_explanation: Class 3 Budget Authorization: 10-40% definition maturity drives the starting confidence level.
Schedule Level 5: more detailed schedule logic improves QSRA traceability.
Faster: Parallel design/procurement, acceleration, premium logistics and higher interface risk.
Location/space factor: Global / Not specified applies a 1.00 delivery premium.

risks.title: Market escalation
risks.cause: Supplier market tightness, inflation, FX and long procurement window
risks.impact_description: P50 cost becomes understated; commercial approvals or procurement strategy may need reset
risks.mitigation: Early procurement, index-linked allowances, market testing, FX strategy
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $460M / $1.2B / $2.5B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.07 Terminal / Passenger Systems.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 0/0/0 days mapped to activity A1700 Long-lead procurement.

risks.title: Operational phasing disruption
risks.cause: Works in or near live airport operations constrain access and sequencing
risks.impact_description: Delay, night-work premiums, stakeholder disruption and ORAT pressure
risks.mitigation: Phasing simulation, possession plan, airport ops integration board
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $287M / $974M / $2.2B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.04 MEP / Systems / Utilities.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 20/85/205 days mapped to activity A1400 Planning, regulatory and stakeholder approvals.

risks.title: Scope growth
risks.cause: Ambiguous requirements, immature scope freeze and late stakeholder changes
risks.risk_event: Approved scope expands after estimate freeze
risks.impact_description: Additional quantities, redesign, rework, procurement churn and board contingency drawdown
risks.description: Approved scope expands after estimate freeze
risks.trigger: Scope change rate exceeds 2% of package value
risks.mitigation: Freeze scope baseline, change board, value gates, client decision log
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $345M / $974M / $2.0B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.06 Airfield Works.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/55/154 days mapped to activity A1600 Detailed design / IFC development.

risks.title: Design maturity gap
risks.cause: Estimate is based on immature design, incomplete surveys or unresolved interfaces
risks.risk_event: Design basis changes during detailed design
risks.impact_description: Cost growth, quantity movement, rework and schedule resequencing
risks.description: Design basis changes during detailed design
risks.mitigation: Design maturity gates, independent review, assumption register
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $345M / $1.1B / $2.2B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.10 Direct Materials.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/55/154 days mapped to activity A1900 Main construction / fabrication / assembly.

risks.title: Productivity underperformance
risks.cause: Access constraints, poor sequencing, labour scarcity or learning curve
risks.impact_description: Extended duration, increased preliminaries and loss of float
risks.trigger: SPI/CPI deteriorates for two reporting periods
risks.mitigation: Package productivity controls, daily planning, earned value cadence
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $345M / $974M / $2.0B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.01 General Conditions / Prelims.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/61/166 days mapped to activity A2100 Commissioning, operations readiness and closeout.

risks.title: Supply chain delay
risks.cause: Long-lead equipment, constrained suppliers or late procurement release
risks.impact_description: Delayed installation, critical path movement and acceleration cost
risks.mitigation: Alternate suppliers, early orders, expediting, framework options
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $230M / $852M / $1.9B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.11 Plant / Equipment.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/49/154 days mapped to activity A2000 Systems integration and testing.

risks.title: Baggage / security systems integration
risks.cause: Complex passenger systems integration and vendor interfaces uncertain
risks.risk_event: Integrated airport systems do not pass readiness testing
risks.impact_description: Commissioning delay, passenger disruption and late operational readiness
risks.description: Integrated airport systems do not pass readiness testing
risks.mitigation: Factory acceptance testing, integration lab, ORAT dry-runs
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $230M / $852M / $1.9B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.05 Specialist Equipment / Fit-Out.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/61/154 days mapped to activity A1500 Procurement strategy and tender packaging.

risks.title: Interface misalignment
risks.cause: Multiple contractors, unclear interface ownership or late design coordination
risks.risk_event: Package interfaces do not align during installation/integration
risks.impact_description: Rework, claims, delay and fragmented accountability
risks.description: Package interfaces do not align during installation/integration
risks.mitigation: Interface control documents, weekly interface board, accountable owners
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $230M / $852M / $1.7B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.03 Permits / Insurance / Bonds.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/43/128 days mapped to activity P1100 Airfield works - mobilise / method.

risks.title: Commissioning delay
risks.cause: Incomplete readiness, software integration issues or defects during testing
risks.risk_event: Systems fail tests or require repeated commissioning cycles
risks.impact_description: Delayed handover, operational readiness slippage and liquidated damages exposure
risks.description: Systems fail tests or require repeated commissioning cycles
risks.mitigation: Commissioning readiness plan, early test packs, digital systems integration
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $230M / $731M / $1.5B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.02 Design / Professional Fees.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/43/128 days mapped to activity P1000 Airfield works.

risks.title: Permits / approvals delay
risks.cause: Authority process, stakeholder objections or incomplete submissions
risks.impact_description: Critical path delay, extended preliminaries and potential redesign conditions
risks.mitigation: Authority plan, consent tracker, early submissions, stakeholder map
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $115M / $487M / $993M based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.09 Direct Labour.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 20/85/230 days mapped to activity A1800 Site / launch integration readiness.

benchmarks.why: Depends on runway, terminal, baggage, rail/road connections and land.
Approvals, airside phasing and operational readiness dominate.

scenario_comparison.label: Faster
scenario_comparison.why: Parallel design/procurement, acceleration, premium logistics and higher interface risk.

scenario_comparison.label: Cheaper
scenario_comparison.why: Value engineering, tighter scope and procurement competition, with schedule/quality exposure.

scenario_comparison.label: Lower Risk
scenario_comparison.why: More surveys, assurance, stage gates, contingency and schedule buffers.

scenario_comparison.label: Premium
scenario_comparison.why: Best assurance, independent review, early procurement and high-confidence governance.

scenario_comparison.label: Investor
scenario_comparison.why: Investment-framing case with transparent risk and commercial challenge.

scenario_comparison.label: Survival
scenario_comparison.why: Minimum viable scope, warning-heavy, high residual risk.

launch_demo_script: Open with: 'Give me any project on Earth or in Space.'
Type the project into CASEY and hit Generate Full Intelligence Pack.
Show the executive dashboard: cost, schedule, risk, confidence and top drivers.
Switch to Monte Carlo: show QCRA/QSRA P-curves and tornado drivers linked to activities.
Show scenarios: Faster, Cheaper, Lower Risk and Premium with why each changed.
Open Output Centre: Excel, Risk CSV, XER, Word, PDF, PPTX and ZIP are ready.
Close with: 'Traditional advisory takes weeks. CASEY gives the first board-grade view in seconds.'
red_flags: Confidence below board-comfort threshold: improve scope definition, benchmark evidence and supplier quotes.
board_challenge_questions: What evidence supports the P50 cost and P80 confidence?
Which five risks create most contingency?
Which activities drive the QSRA finish-date risk?
What data would increase confidence before approval?
What is the fastest credible lower-risk path?
next_best_actions: Run a risk workshop to validate probability and O/M/P impacts.
Confirm top five CBS cost drivers with benchmark or supplier evidence.
Validate the Level 3/4 schedule logic and critical path assumptions.
Prepare board decision paper with Base/Faster/Cheaper/Lower-Risk cases.
Create confidence improvement plan targeting design maturity, consents and procurement evidence.

risk_register.title: Market escalation
risk_register.cause: Supplier market tightness, inflation, FX and long procurement window
risk_register.impact_description: P50 cost becomes understated; commercial approvals or procurement strategy may need reset
risk_register.mitigation: Early procurement, index-linked allowances, market testing, FX strategy
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $460M / $1.2B / $2.5B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.07 Terminal / Passenger Systems.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 0/0/0 days mapped to activity A1700 Long-lead procurement.

risk_register.title: Operational phasing disruption
risk_register.cause: Works in or near live airport operations constrain access and sequencing
risk_register.impact_description: Delay, night-work premiums, stakeholder disruption and ORAT pressure
risk_register.mitigation: Phasing simulation, possession plan, airport ops integration board
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $287M / $974M / $2.2B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.04 MEP / Systems / Utilities.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 20/85/205 days mapped to activity A1400 Planning, regulatory and stakeholder approvals.

risk_register.title: Scope growth
risk_register.cause: Ambiguous requirements, immature scope freeze and late stakeholder changes
risk_register.risk_event: Approved scope expands after estimate freeze
risk_register.impact_description: Additional quantities, redesign, rework, procurement churn and board contingency drawdown
risk_register.description: Approved scope expands after estimate freeze
risk_register.trigger: Scope change rate exceeds 2% of package value
risk_register.mitigation: Freeze scope baseline, change board, value gates, client decision log
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $345M / $974M / $2.0B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.06 Airfield Works.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/55/154 days mapped to activity A1600 Detailed design / IFC development.

risk_register.title: Design maturity gap
risk_register.cause: Estimate is based on immature design, incomplete surveys or unresolved interfaces
risk_register.risk_event: Design basis changes during detailed design
risk_register.impact_description: Cost growth, quantity movement, rework and schedule resequencing
risk_register.description: Design basis changes during detailed design
risk_register.mitigation: Design maturity gates, independent review, assumption register
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $345M / $1.1B / $2.2B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.10 Direct Materials.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/55/154 days mapped to activity A1900 Main construction / fabrication / assembly.

risk_register.title: Productivity underperformance
risk_register.cause: Access constraints, poor sequencing, labour scarcity or learning curve
risk_register.impact_description: Extended duration, increased preliminaries and loss of float
risk_register.trigger: SPI/CPI deteriorates for two reporting periods
risk_register.mitigation: Package productivity controls, daily planning, earned value cadence
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $345M / $974M / $2.0B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.01 General Conditions / Prelims.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/61/166 days mapped to activity A2100 Commissioning, operations readiness and closeout.

risk_register.title: Supply chain delay
risk_register.cause: Long-lead equipment, constrained suppliers or late procurement release
risk_register.impact_description: Delayed installation, critical path movement and acceleration cost
risk_register.mitigation: Alternate suppliers, early orders, expediting, framework options
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $230M / $852M / $1.9B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.11 Plant / Equipment.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/49/154 days mapped to activity A2000 Systems integration and testing.

risk_register.title: Baggage / security systems integration
risk_register.cause: Complex passenger systems integration and vendor interfaces uncertain
risk_register.risk_event: Integrated airport systems do not pass readiness testing
risk_register.impact_description: Commissioning delay, passenger disruption and late operational readiness
risk_register.description: Integrated airport systems do not pass readiness testing
risk_register.mitigation: Factory acceptance testing, integration lab, ORAT dry-runs
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $230M / $852M / $1.9B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.05 Specialist Equipment / Fit-Out.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/61/154 days mapped to activity A1500 Procurement strategy and tender packaging.

risk_register.title: Interface misalignment
risk_register.cause: Multiple contractors, unclear interface ownership or late design coordination
risk_register.risk_event: Package interfaces do not align during installation/integration
risk_register.impact_description: Rework, claims, delay and fragmented accountability
risk_register.description: Package interfaces do not align during installation/integration
risk_register.mitigation: Interface control documents, weekly interface board, accountable owners
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $230M / $852M / $1.7B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.03 Permits / Insurance / Bonds.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/43/128 days mapped to activity P1100 Airfield works - mobilise / method.

risk_register.title: Commissioning delay
risk_register.cause: Incomplete readiness, software integration issues or defects during testing
risk_register.risk_event: Systems fail tests or require repeated commissioning cycles
risk_register.impact_description: Delayed handover, operational readiness slippage and liquidated damages exposure
risk_register.description: Systems fail tests or require repeated commissioning cycles
risk_register.mitigation: Commissioning readiness plan, early test packs, digital systems integration
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $230M / $731M / $1.5B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.02 Design / Professional Fees.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/43/128 days mapped to activity P1000 Airfield works.

risk_register.title: Permits / approvals delay
risk_register.cause: Authority process, stakeholder objections or incomplete submissions
risk_register.impact_description: Critical path delay, extended preliminaries and potential redesign conditions
risk_register.mitigation: Authority plan, consent tracker, early submissions, stakeholder map
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $115M / $487M / $993M based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.09 Direct Labour.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 20/85/230 days mapped to activity A1800 Site / launch integration readiness.
